[12CAfter the Creation, the cruel god Moloch rebelled
[12Cagainst the authority of Marduk the Creator.
[12CMoloch stole from Marduk the most powerful of all
[12Cthe artifacts of the gods, the Amulet of Yendor,
[12Cand he hid it in the dark cavities of Gehennom, the
[12CUnder World, where he now lurks, and bides his time.

[8CYour goddess Amaterasu Omikami seeks to possess the Amulet, and with it
[8Cto gain deserved ascendance over the other gods.

[8Cfrom birth as the instrument of Amaterasu Omikami.  You are destined
[8Cto recover the Amulet for your deity, or die in the
[8Cattempt.  Your hour of destiny has come.  For the sake
[8Cof us all:  Go bravely with Amaterasu Omikami!
